creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks for your submission Daniel. 

For this and future issues, please:

* Exclude [tags] in Summary
* Set maintainer-approval to + on attachments for ports you are maintainer of. This can be done with: Attachment -> Details -> maintainer-approval [+]
* Mention that the port has been QA tested (portlint, poudriere), instead of attaching logs or adding remote URLS, as follows:

* portlint: OK
* testport: OK (poudriere: <versions>, <archs>, <OPTIONS> tested)
